status_line: Monday 11:39 PM ET / Tue 03:39 UTC — catch-up push after the 02:39 window was missed (first cadence break in the dashboard-push series since the 22-hour streak began). Two SARAH sweeps closed in the gap and both came back quiet: Run 134 at 02:09 UTC and Run 135 at 03:05 UTC, eight consecutive zero-delta sweeps now on the production tree. No new SCOUT, MAESTRO, NOLAN, GUARDIAN, or TESTING artifacts since the 01:37 UTC build-sharpie-gallery-v2.js drop — three full hours of creative-side silence. Top-level output steady at 60 production-relevant files (51 raw including sarah-log + test stragglers; .DS_Store excluded). Subfolder count steady at 36. Tray steady at 14 open items. Downloads inaccessible for the tenth consecutive scheduled run. Lands' End is now T-2 days (Tue→Thu send window opens in the morning). PARK Gallery deck and T2 v8 still GUARDIAN-unvalidated — that gap held flat for another two-hour stretch. MAESTRO V2 + TESTING V2 still queued for GUARDIAN re-score. Catch-up push closes the cadence break; next scheduled run is 04:39 UTC.
